column1: #mapping_set_description: "Mappings from Energy News Ontology v0.3.0 to ENVO, Schema.org, and DBpedia"

column8: ENVO power plant is an environmental feature; enews is BFO:Object
DBpedia PowerStation is subclass of Infrastructure
schema:GovernmentOrganization is broader (any govt org, not just regulatory)
Both represent news articles; schema:NewsArticle is more specific (news vs generic article)
schema:Place is broader (any location); enews restricts to energy-relevant regions
schema:DataFeed is broader (any structured data feed); enews is curated social media feed
